title: Build a Form and Table Verification Record
summary: Build a Form and Table Verification Record retrieves prior skills in an original validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply form table testing in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk contract · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which practice survives changed data and devices? Scenario: validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk.
steps.why: Build a Form and Table Verification Record makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk.

content.text: One successful mouse submission proves little. Robust forms and tables need keyboard-only completion, visible focus, zoom and reflow, narrow-width inspection, valid and invalid data, error recovery, source and accessibility-tree checks, and representative screen-reader semantics. Record evidence and retest after each repair. Apply it to validator keyboard zoom and semantics test desk.
